name: Chocolate Peanut Butter (Tiger Butter) Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt white chocolate in the microwave on medium power for 5 to 8 minutes, stirring every minute.
2. Stir in peanut butter and quickly spread the mixture on a wax paper-lined cookie sheet.
3. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate chips for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
4. Drizzle the melted chocolate over the mixture in the pan and swirl together.
5. Refrigerate until firm, then break into pieces. Makes about 1 1/2 pounds.
